NotifyFrom.description:
Time of the day indicating when notifications about the manual daily closure requirement should start to be dispatched to clients
 
*Recommended config level:* `Location`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

NotifyTo.description:
Time of the day indicating when notifications about the manual daily closure requirement should stop to be dispatched to clients
 
*Recommended config level:* `Location`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

ManualDailyClosureConfiguration.description: Configures various behaviour connected to manual daily closure.

RefreshIntervalSec.description:
Interval for price changes status update in seconds
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

MaxPriceDigits.description:
Maximum digits that price can have
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

VisibleBefore.description:
The time interval prior to executing a price change at which changes are visible
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

AttemptsToBlockProduct.description:
The number of attempts to apply a price change before considering it 'failed' and blocking authorization for that product. 0 means that no block will be performed.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

MaxInProgressTime.description:
Max amount of time to consider InProgress price change valid, if limit passes price change will be considered failed and system will try to apply it again.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

Interval.description:
Email sending interval: If set to 00:00:00, the email will be sent only once without any repetition.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

From.description:
Sender email address.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

UseTls.description:
Flag to use TLS.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

BlockedProductEmailOptions.description:
Options for email notification about product being blocked. If empty no email notification used.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

PriceChangeOptions.description: Configures various behaviour connected to price change.

TanksRefreshIntervalSeconds.description:
Configures tank data refresh interval. When executed -> tank collect its measurement data (measurement data Volume, Level etc..).
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

TankDataAgeThresholdSeconds.description:
Threshold in seconds that sets maximum age of tank measurement. If measurement is older it is considered as not valid.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

AutoClearZeroTransactions.description:
Configures if zero transactions should be cleared automatically. Zerro transaction is transaction with 0 quantity/amount.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

SiteControllerLocalDeviceId.description:
Id of siteController on local site, for example used in communication with DOMS as POS identity when automatically lock/clearing transactions.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

DispenserErrorAlertSec.description:
Time in seconds that if dispenser stays in error state, alert is fired.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

DispenserTransactionUnpaidAlertSec.description:
Time in seconds that if dispenser transaction stays unpaid, alert is fired.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

DispenserTransactionActiveAlertSec.description:
Time in seconds that if dispenser transaction stays as active fuelling, alert is fired.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

DispenserDelayBetweenResendNotifications.description:
Time in milliseconds to delay resending configured notifications.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

DispensersPreauthorizationConfiguration.description:
Configuration related to dispensers preauthorization.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`

DefaultPreauthorizationAmountAdjustment.description:
Default adjustment value for amount based preauthorization.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

DefaultPreauthorizationVolumeAdjustment.description:
Default adjustment value for volume based preauthorization.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

DefaultDispensingAmountLimit.description:
Default dispensing limit which siteController sets for dispenser with Automatic DispenserAuthorizationType. If 0, no limit is set.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

DeviceSpecificConfigurations.description:
Preauthorization configurations for specific device.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Application`

PreauthorizationAmountAdjustment.description:
Adjustment value for amount based preauthorization.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Application`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

PreauthorizationVolumeAdjustment.description:
Adjustment value for volume based preauthorization.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Application`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

SiteControllerDevicesConfiguration.description: Configures various behaviour connected to devices.

DispenserActivityTechnicalLogFilename.description:
Configures path and file name for dispenser activity forecourt log. If null no log is created
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

DispenserTotalizersTechnicalLogFilename.description:
Configures path and file name for totalizer forecourt log. If null no log is created
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

TankMeasurementTechnicalLogFilename.description:
Configures path and file name for tank measurement forecourt log. If null no log is created
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

DispenserTotalizersTechnicalLogInterval.description:
Configures interval for dispenser totalizer forecourt log. DispenserTotalizersTechnicalLogFilename has to be filled for this parameter to function.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

TankMeasurementTechnicalLogInterval.description:
Configures interval for tank measurement forecourt log. TankMeasurementTechnicalLogFilename has to be filled for this parameter to function.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

TechnicalLogRotationInterval.description:
Configures interval for dispenser activity forecourt log. DispenserActivityTechnicalLogFilename has to be filled for this parameter to function.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

ForecourtLoggerConfiguration.description: Configures various behaviour connected to forecourt logger.

PosybeRegistrator.description: Configures various behaviour connected to posybe registrator.

Secret.description:
Secret which is used to decrypt _regfile used in registration.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

ExportIntervalMinutes.description:
Configures interval in minutes in which forecourt data are automatically send to platform. Note: after each forecourt data is created sending mechanism is triggered anyway
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

FailedExportRetryDelayMinutes.description:
Configures interval in minutes in which forecourt data which previously failed to be send to plaftorm are automatically resend. Note: after each forecourt data is created resending mechanism is triggered anyway
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

FcExportOptions.description: Configures various behaviour connected to export of forecourt data.

ResendIntervalMinutes.description:
Configures interval in minutes in which failed api calls are automatically resend to platform.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

FailedResendRetryDelayMinutes.description:
Delay in minutes for failed api calls to be resend.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

MaxAttempts.description:
Max attempts for api call to be resend.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

ApiCallsResendOptions.description: Configures various behaviour connected to resend of api calls.

AutoDataCollectionOptions.description: Configures various behaviour connected to automatic data collection.

AutoStoreDispenserTransactions.description:
Switch to automatically store dispenser transactions. Does not work for zero transactions.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

AutoStoreZeroTransactions.description:
Switch to automatically store zero dispenser transactions reported by HW. Meaning 0 quantity/amount. Note: if zero transactions are not allowed on HW (for example DOMS) they wont be reported by HW so SiteController cannot store them
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

AutoStoreTankMeasurementsOnAlarm.description:
Switch to create Informative forecourt inventory whenever alarm on tank is raised.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

AutoNozzleStoreInterval.description:
Interval in minutes to create Periodic forecourt inventory containing nozzle registers. Note: if AutoNozzleStoreInterval and AutoStoreTankMeasurementsInterval are equal -> only one FC inventory will be created containing both types of data.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

AutoStoreTankMeasurementsInterval.description:
Interval in minutes to create Periodic forecourt inventory containing tank measurements. Note: if AutoNozzleStoreInterval and AutoStoreTankMeasurementsInterval are equal -> only one FC inventory will be created containing both types of data.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

AutomaticDailyClosureTriggerCron.description:
Cron expression which sets when automatic daily closure is executed.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

AutomaticDailyClosureMissedFireThreshold.description:
If the application starts within this threshold after the scheduled daily closure time, the closure job will be triggered immediately with the correct scheduled date.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

DailyClosureMergeMaxRestoreDays.description:
Max days to past for restoration of unmerged daily closures.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

DailyClosureMergeAutoTriggerHours.description:
SC will automatically try to check for unmerged daily closures in set interval specified by this parameter in hours.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

ForecourtDataCleanupTriggerCron.description:
Cron expression which sets when automatic forecourt data removal job should be triggered.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

ForecourtDataRetentionPeriodInDays.description:
Max age in days for forecourt data to be stored in SC, if older data will be removed by ForecourtDataCleanup.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

ForecourtDataCleunupDeleteRecordsOlderTh.description:
Max age in days for retention of records regardless of their status in ForecourtDataCleanup.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

MopCodesWithReturn.description:
Mop codes where transaction money is returned.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Merchant`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

DispenserTransactionOptions.description: Configures various behaviours connected to dispenser transactions.

PlatformSettings.description: Configures various behaviour connected to platform.

KeycloakSettings.description:
Keycloak related settings.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Appsettings`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

KeycloakClientId.description:
Keycloak client id.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Appsettings`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

PlatformBaseUrl.description:
Platform base url.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Appsettings`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

HttpClientOptions.description:
Platform HttpClient options.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Appsettings`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

TimeoutInSeconds.description:
Http client timeout in seconds.
 
*Recommended config level:* `Appsettings`
 
*Change type:* `Restart`

PriceChangeException.description:
Manually throws exception when trying to apply price change
 
*Recommended config level:* `Appsettings`
 
*Change type:* `Automatic`

DebugOptions.description: Various debug options for the site controller.

description:
Describes the configuration for the Windows SiteController
 
 
 
*Recommended config level* defines the level where parameter is SHOULD be defined.
 
   - `System`: System level – applies to **all merchants** and the **entire system**.
 
   - `Merchant`: Merchant level – applies to a **single registered merchant**.
 
   - `Location`: Location level – applies to **all applications** at a specific location.
 
   - `Application`: Application level – applies to the **current application only**.
 
  - `Appsettings`: Appsettings – value is read from **`appsettings.json`**.
 
 
 
*Change type* defines when changes are applied to the application.
 
   - `Automatic`: Changes are applied automatically while the application is running.
 
   - `Restart`: Changes require a **restart of the application** to take effect.
